string 2: Ah, welcome. You...
{next}...Are who exactly?
{next}What are you doing here?
{next}Are you suffering from amnesia?
Interesting. You're a sharp one. It's a pleasure to meet you.

I see. Judging by your surprise, the version of me in this
world must be rather busy.
No, you mistake me. This is the first time we've met.

I'm Minervamon, but not the one you might know.
I come from another world.

The reason I've come is to test my strength. I'm here with
the rest of the Olympos XII.

I'll be waiting beyond this space with the others. Join us
when you're ready for battle!
{next}Let's fight!
{end}Not now.

Hello! I sense great fighting spirit in this world! What do
you say we get right to it?

Oh, you ready to go another round? I'll take you on as
many times as you want!
Just the words I've been waiting for! Time to have some fun!
How exhilarating! Battling strong opponents is the best!
I have been waiting. Shall we fight?

It would be a shame to have such fun only once. How about we
fight again?
I have been hoping to fight you! Do not hold back, now!

Fighting you has made me realize that if you are this
strong, this world is in good hands!

A wandering journey across time and space... all for this
battle.

You seem like you still have energy to spare. Should you
desire a rematch, I will accept!

I have been eagerly awaiting this fight with you. Now... let
us begin!

With someone like you in this world, it must be brimming
with excitement!

Don't keep me waiting too long. Come on. Let's get this
fight started, already!

Aww, we're having too much fun to quit now! C'mon. Let's go
again!

I might not be the same me you're familiar with, so brace
yourself!

Hahaha! That was so much fun! The journey was worth it for a
battle like this!

I cannot help but be intrigued by you. Would you grant me
the honor of a battle?

I will gladly test your ability as many times as you wish.
Would you like to fight again?
Very well, let us begin. Do not let your guard down!

That was an excellent battle... truly. And I am relieved to
see that you are very strong.
Care to battle me? I promise it will be fun.

I am not weary yet. And neither are you, I assume. What say
we fight another round?

That is the spirit! I shall make sure this is not boring for
you!

The clash of strength against strength is the best kind of
music! That was wonderful!

You want to fight me, too, yes? Do not think you can hide
it. I can tell!
I want to fight you more! Say, square off with me again!
All right, I will take you on! Come at me however you like!

Whoa... No way. You are incredibly strong! It looks like I
will need to train harder.

I did not come here just to tag along with Apollomon. I came
to fight you.

Hohoho, having too much fun to quit? I feel the same way.
Let us have another match!

Very well. Let us battle right now! I cannot wait any
longer!

Wow, you are amazingly strong. But I was a pretty tough
opponent, too, was I not?

I have been looking forward to meeting you. Would you honor
me with a battle?

Repeated battle will polish you like a gemstone. I would be
honored to assist you.

There is no need for many words. Let us speak through the
clash of battle!

Your strength is not meant to destroy, but to save. Never
forget that.

Akihabara in this world is the best! And, on top of that, I
get to enjoy a fight with you!

Hm? Could it be you're looking for a rematch? Hahaha! I'll
gladly take you on anytime!

Oh, you'll take me on? I'm glad I made the journey. All
right. Here I come!

You struck a great pose. Can you do it again? I want to turn
it into an action figure.

Battling a worthy rival is the best kind of celebration! So,
are you ready?

Fighting you never gets old! I could do it over and over
again!

All right, let's do this! And let's make sure we both enjoy
ourselves. Have you got that?!

Phew! That was as satisfying as the way my stomach feels
after a feast!

Talking to you feels kind of strange, you know. But let us
have a battle.

To fight a person is to understand them. Shall we cross
swords once more?

Do not hold back. I shall be coming at you with everything I
have, of course!

Your power does not belong to you alone. Please... use it
wisely.
Wait. Are you serious? You've beaten all of us!

I never thought it'd get this far... It's not like I didn't give it 
my full effort, either.

I offer you my praise. Congratulations on
defeating all of the Olympos XII!
